mapper.select: SELECT id, isbn, title, author, category_id, cover_image, borrow_count FROM book WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 ORDER BY borrow_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, isbn, title, author, category_id, cover_image, create_time FROM book WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM book WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND deleted = 0
